narrative:
Rush Township has 1,837 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
